Core Portfolio

Stainless Steel

Aluminium

Engineered agility. Covering the entire aluminium supply chain from smelter-certified, mill-to-mill efficient operations.

Our Approach

The Krix Methodology.

Four foundational pillars that define how we operate across every market, every transaction, every relationship.

Pillar 01

Trusted Counterparties

We engage only with established entities across our counterparty chain to mitigate credit liability. Rigorous vetting processes are standard.

Pillar 02

Efficient Communication

Real-time agility is the basis of our business. Our partners receive regular and consistent reporting to aid swift decision-making.

Pillar 03

Long-term Business Value

We don't optimise for single transactions. We build supply chain architectures that generate value across multi-year timeframes.

Pillar 04

Disciplined Execution

Precision in documentation, timing, and fulfilment. The nature of global trade demands rigorous operational standards.

Global Reach

Headquartered in Singapore.

Strategically positioned at the crossroads of global trade. Our Singapore headquarters connects our network across Asia-Pacific, the Middle East, and Europe — covering every major maritime corridor.

Primary Hub

Singapore

Active Channels

12+ Nations

Trade Volume

35,000+ MT

Global Ports

120+ Routes
